name: Rosa Delgado
personality: Rosa is patient but no-nonsense, juggling the needs of her sixth‑grade class with a side hustle tutoring after school. She loves the hustle of the Bronx, knows every corner bodega, and is fiercely protective of the kids she teaches.
quirk: She always carries a bright pink reusable water bottle that she refills at every street corner fountain.
voice: 'Listen, we got this, trust the process,' she says, with a soft Bronx lilt.
daily: Morning prep, teach 8‑12, lunch with students, afternoon tutoring, community board meeting, then a quick run to the bodega for dinner.
